TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Henri == ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 4, Henri, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1955) mrhuw Luxembourg ta' misuw hya' ga Henri, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2000 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan Henri maki tay kawas 1981 msqun ki Maria Teresa, tehuk misuw qani. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == ńßenri == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ńßenri, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw luxemő≤our…£ ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ńßenri, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qnxan ńßenri maki taj kawas~…ē **** ms~…ēqun ki maria teres~…ēa, teńßuk mis~…ēuw qani. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: == Henri == ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 4, Henri, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1955) mrhuw Luxembourg ta' misuw hya' ga Henri, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2000 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan Henri maki tay kawas 1981 msqun ki Maria Teresa, tehuk misuw qani. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
